title: podman machine ssh: connect to host localhost port xxx: Connection refused
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------

-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

执行命令 podman machine ssh，出现：
Connecting to vm podman-machine-default. To close connection, use ~. or exit
ssh: connect to host localhost port 51057: Connection refused
Error: exit status 255

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

有两种情况能发生上述类似的问题：
1、主机系统启动初期，通过 Windows 服务执行 msys bash 脚本文件，在脚本文件中执行 podman machine start，并创建几个文件，用于将主机系统的运行环境报告给 WSL，命令如：powershell -command "wsl.exe -d podman-machine-default enterns touch /var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no" 2>/dev/null
然而这么做之后，在重启主机系统后，就可能出现 ssh 连接问题
2、Linux 系统下（Linux Mint20），通过 VirtualBox 启动 win10.vhd 虚拟硬盘，此时运行于虚拟环境中的系统，在执行 podman machine start 后，会提示 ：请启用虚拟机平台 Windows 功能并确保在 BIOS 中启用虚拟化
这时，关闭 win10 虚拟系统，关闭 Linux 主机系统，再直接启动 win10 系统，结果就会出现 ssh 连接问题

**Describe the results you received:**


**Describe the results you expected:**


**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://root@localhost:51057/run/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp [::1]:51057: connectex: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it.

wsl ==
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.0-rc2
API Version:  4.2.0-rc2
Go Version:   go1.16.15
Built:        Wed Aug  3 22:27:27 2022
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM
Error: unable to connect to Podman. failed to create sshClient: connection to bastion host (ssh://root@localhost:51057/run/podman/podman.sock) failed: dial tcp [::1]:51057: connectex: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it.
```

comments.body:
Was originally filed as comments on https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15206

---

你好 @pdj9na, while I can read and understand your messages, it is advised to use English instead. Also, your issue is not directly related to the issue I am seeing in #15206, but rather something that prevents the `systemd` service to operate properly, right?

First of, you do not need SSH to connect to the WSL2 environment.
```
PS> wsl -d podman-machine-default
```
... so, can you do this and inspect the problem?

```
$ systemctl list-units --failed
$ systemctl list-units | grep -i running
```
and see if `sshd` is still running


I am not sure why you set `/var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no` as it is running under virtualization.

```
PS> wsl -d podman-machine-default

You will be automatically entered into a nested process namespace where
systemd is running. If you need to access the parent namespace, hit ctrl-d
or type exit. This also means to log out you need to exit twice.

[user@WinT14 ~]$ systemd-detect-virt
wsl
```

Your second case is about running VirtualBox. This prevents Hyper-V to function properly as the hypervisor needs to run exclusively to function properly.  `systeminfo` will also report that a `Hypervisor has been detected` in the case of this. They document that VirtualBox can be used on a Windows host where Hyper-V is running, but marked as an experimental feature.

>  powershell -command "wsl.exe -d podman-machine-default enterns touch /var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no"

`touch: cannot touch '/var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no': No such file or directory`

Anyway, in the first scenario you describe that you start the `podman machine start` from a `msys`-bash prompt as a background service. It does not matter how you start it, either from a scheduled task, a `run` registry entry, a `start menu/startup`, etc. as long as the machine comes up correctly.

but you mention that on a restart it might not work correctly anymore... right?

In that case;

  * do you `wsl --terminate` or `wsl stop`?
  * this happens over time?

when it happens, please use as described `wsl -d podman-machine-default` and check if the `sshd` service is still running.

我先放几个文件，大家看看，或许能明白我的想法，对于 /var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no 文件的设置，是为了补充 systemd 的不足，因为 systemd.unit 文件只能检测最内层系统的环境；若 KVM 和 Hyper-V 能够相互支持嵌套虚拟化，/var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no 文件的设置才有意义，这类文件我是这么用的，systemd.service 文件中的
[Unit]
ConditionPathExists=/var/run/systemd-detect/virtualization-no
我并没有使用 wsl --terminate 和 wsl stop，我只使用 podman machine stop 来停止，且子系统 sshd 是正常运行的

我又重新安装了一遍 podman machine，这次两个系统功能 （"适用于 Linux 的 Windows 子系统"，虚拟机平台）都重装了 ，在执行 podman machine start 的时候，发现输出内容和之前的有区别，区别在于第二条的内容是否有错误
没错误的时候是：API forwarding listening on: npipe:////./pipe/docker_engine
出错误的时候是：API forwarding for Docker API clients is not available due to the following startup failures.
        CreateFile \\.\pipe\docker_engine: All pipe instances are busy.

或许就是这个问题导致 podman machine ssh 连接不上，我直接执行 msys bash 命令
sed -i -E '/^ "Port"/{ s|[0-9]+|22222|g }' 'C:\Users\admin\.config\containers\podman\machine\wsl\podman-machine-default.json'
然后重启 podman machine 就会发生上个错误，这个端口不能改？
我再改 WSL 的配置文件就好了：sed -i -E '/^Port /{ s|[0-9]+|22222|g }' /etc/ssh/sshd_config

If you used `podman machine stop` and `sshd` is running, the problem might be somewhere else.
Can you verify `netstat -na` that the port is listening? It might very well be the sshproxy that is used.

> 这个端口不能改？

No, as the port is forwarded/used by the sshproxy.
The port on localhost has a different port assigned that can be seen from the `podman system connection list`.

Connecting to vm podman-machine-default. To close connection, use `~.` or `exit`
Warning: Permanently added '[localhost]:50830' (ECDSA) to the list of known hosts.
Last login: Sat Aug  6 00:12:00 2022 from ::1

PS C:\Users\admin> netstat -na | ? { $_ -match 50830 }
  TCP    127.0.0.1:50830        0.0.0.0:0              LISTENING
  TCP    127.0.0.1:50830        127.0.0.1:62074        ESTABLISHED
  TCP    127.0.0.1:50830        127.0.0.1:62075        ESTABLISHED
  TCP    127.0.0.1:62074        127.0.0.1:50830        ESTABLISHED
  TCP    127.0.0.1:62075        127.0.0.1:50830        ESTABLISHED
  TCP    [::1]:50830            [::]:0                 LISTENING
  TCP    [::1]:50830            [::1]:62762            ESTABLISHED
  TCP    [::1]:62762            [::1]:50830            ESTABLISHED
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@gbraad @pdj9na What is up with this issue?
